attrs.label: Omni Endpoint
attrs.description: Full URL of your Omni instance (e.g., https://omni.example.com).

attrs.label: Omni Service Account Key
attrs.description:
Base64-encoded service account key.</br>
Create with: `omnictl serviceaccount create --role=InfraProvider infra-provider:truenas`

attrs.label: Skip Omni TLS Verification
attrs.description: Disable TLS certificate verification for the Omni endpoint.

attrs.label: Provider ID
attrs.description:
Unique provider identifier registered in Omni (e.g. `truenas-prod`, `truenas-lab`).</br>
Must be unique per Omni instance; do not reuse across TrueNAS hosts.

attrs.label: Provider Display Name
attrs.description: How this provider appears in the Omni UI.

attrs.label: TrueNAS Host
attrs.description:
TrueNAS hostname or IP.</br>
Use `host.docker.internal` when running as a TrueNAS app on the same system.

attrs.label: TrueNAS API Key
attrs.description:
API key for a dedicated non-root user in the `builtin_administrators` group, with the password disabled.</br>
Do not use the root user's key.</br>
See the upstream [TrueNAS setup guide](https://github.com/bearbinary/controller/blob/main/docs/truenas-setup.md) for the exact steps.

attrs.label: Skip TLS Verification
attrs.description: Skip TLS certificate verification. Recommended when using a self-signed certificate.

attrs.label: Default ZFS Pool
attrs.description:
Name of an existing ZFS pool used for VM zvols and cached ISO images.</br>
Run `zpool list` on the TrueNAS host to see available pools.

attrs.label: Default Network Interface
attrs.description:
Host network interface attached to provisioned VM NICs (e.g. `br0`, `vlan100`, `enp5s0`).</br>
Leave empty to let the provider auto-select the first available bridge at provision time.

attrs.label: Graceful Shutdown Timeout (seconds)
attrs.description: Seconds to wait for ACPI shutdown before force-stop on deprovision.

attrs.label: User ID
attrs.description: The user id that Omni Infra TrueNAS Provider files will be owned by.

attrs.label: Group ID
attrs.description: The group id that Omni Infra TrueNAS Provider files will be owned by.

attrs.label: Networks
attrs.description: The docker networks to join.

attrs.label: Name
attrs.description:
The name of the network to join.</br>
The network must already exist.

attrs.label: Containers
attrs.description: The containers to add to this network.

attrs.label: Aliases (Optional)
attrs.description: The network aliases to use for this container on this network.

attrs.label: Interface Name (Optional)
attrs.description: The network interface name to use for this network

attrs.label: MAC Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The MAC address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv4 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv4 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv6 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv6 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: Gateway Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates the priority of the gateway for this network interface.

attrs.label: Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates in which order Compose connects the service's containers to its networks.

attrs.label: Type
attrs.description:
ixVolume: Is dataset created automatically by the system.</br>
Host Path: Is a path that already exists on the system.</br>
SMB Share: Is a SMB share that is mounted to as a volume.</br>
NFS Share: Is a NFS share that is mounted to as a volume.

enum.description: Host Path (Path that already exists on the system)
ixVolume (Dataset created automatically by the system)
SMB/CIFS Share (Mounts a volume to a SMB share)
NFS Share (Mounts a volume to a NFS share)

attrs.label: Read Only
attrs.description: Mount the volume as read only.

attrs.label: Mount Path
attrs.description: The path inside the container to mount the storage.

attrs.label: Enable ACL
attrs.description: Enable ACL for the storage.

attrs.label: Host Path
attrs.description: The host path to use for storage.

attrs.label: ixVolume Configuration
attrs.description: The configuration for the ixVolume dataset.

attrs.label: Enable ACL
attrs.description: Enable ACL for the storage.

attrs.label: Dataset Name
attrs.description: The name of the dataset to use for storage.

attrs.label: SMB Configuration
attrs.description: The configuration for the SMB dataset.

attrs.label: Server
attrs.description: The server to mount the SMB share.

attrs.label: Path
attrs.description: The path to mount the SMB share.

attrs.label: Username
attrs.description: The username to use for the SMB share.

attrs.label: Password
attrs.description: The password to use for the SMB share.

attrs.label: Domain
attrs.description: The domain to use for the SMB share.

attrs.label: NFS Configuration
attrs.description: The configuration for the NFS dataset.

attrs.label: Server
attrs.description: The server to mount the NFS share.

attrs.label: Path
attrs.description: The path to mount the NFS share.

attrs.label: Containers
attrs.description: Containers where the label should be applied

attrs.label: CPUs
attrs.description: CPUs limit for Omni Infra TrueNAS Provider.

attrs.label: Memory (in MB)
attrs.description: Memory limit for Omni Infra TrueNAS Provider.

1.0.0.readme:
Omni TrueNAS Provider

Omni TrueNAS Provider is a Sidero Omni infrastructure provider that provisions and manages Talos Linux VMs on TrueNAS SCALE.

Prerequisites

  • A running Sidero Omni instance
  • An Omni InfraProvider service account key
  • TrueNAS SCALE 25.10 (Goldeye) or newer
  • A TrueNAS API key for a dedicated non-root user in the builtin_administrators group, with the password disabled. Do not use the root key. See the upstream TrueNAS setup guide for the exact steps. A dedicated user gives you a separate audit trail, independent revocation, and no password attack surface.
